title: rtsc — Architecture
ssot_note: JSON=SSOT (AI/tool parse); humans view architecture.html via `python3 serve.py`. Update in-place (not append). History/decisions/dates → CHANGELOG.md + git (never in tree). Hierarchy decomposes via `children` (commons single-doc); one fact per node. Per-material campaign SSOT = state/RTSC_LEDGER.jsonl. Materials carried over from the demiurge repo.

children.role: Room-temperature superconductor (RTSC) discovery as an HONEST falsification framework — predict/screen candidates, run the falsifier cascade, and report negative rulings as results. Target = 293 K @ 1 atm.

Falsifier-first. All gates stay GATE_OPEN / absorbed=false: no candidate is claimed to BE an RTSC. absorbed=true would require accredited 4-probe transport + Meissner expulsion + measured H_c2/T_c (none of which this map flips). 0 RTSC predicted of the funnel candidates.
Research lanes run to date.

High-Chern flat-band quantum-geometry route to ambient room-T SC — CLOSED-NEGATIVE across 10 independent paths (paper: state/papers/flatband-geometry-ambient-roomt-closed). Structural cause = Fubini-Study bound (two levers — large ∫tr g AND strong coupling Ω — cannot coexist in one material).

Ambient superhydride lane (QE + QFORGE from-scratch): Li2CuH6 / Mg2IrH6 ambient-dynamically-unstable; AcBeH8, B-C clathrates inconclusive/deferred. High-pressure hydrides (H3S, LaH10, CaH6 …) recorded as references, deprioritized after the flat-band pivot.
QFORGE from-scratch el-ph engine (SCF→DFPT→el-ph→Tc), validated on Al/Nb/Pb. Gaps walled: magmom (k-Stoner) and pbe-scf (gate-grade ecut OOM); production uses a hybrid path.

Named +@ trilayer real-DFT (H_019 + H_024 follow-on, self-built QE 7.2 on summer + local TB metric). OUR PBE confirms CoSn (layer A) hosts a real kagome flat band (W=0.158 eV, < 0.2 eV). H_024 extracts its quantum geometry: a NN-kagome TB fit to OUR bands gives metric integral I=(1/2pi)∫tr g d2k = 2.856, MATCHING the measured QGT 2.87 (arXiv:2412.17809) -> the g>=2 geometry LEVER SURVIVES; and the ~1.45 eV-below-E_F position is REAL orbital-selection (CoSn has multiple orbital flat bands; PBE ~140 meV faithful to ARPES), NOT a PBE artifact -> resolves the H_019 F2 position-FAIL. H_024 also BOUNDS the lead 🟢-path's (H_023) single unknown via Peotta-Tormae+Huhtinen: the geometry SUPPORTS f_mult>=1.164 at N=2 (conditional on doping+coherence; is_green=False; the cheap route, NOT the intractable full N=2 stack SCF). Ta2NiSe5 (layer B) gap: H_019/H_024 Cmcm PBE SCF FROZE across 10 recipes (byte-identical residuals) -> high-symmetry excitonic-parent ill-conditioning. H_025 TESTED the logged fix: the EXPERIMENTAL low-T MONOCLINIC C2/c ground state (Sunshine&Ibers 1985 via arXiv:2201.07750; vol 701.5A^3, 296 e-) BREAKS the freeze -> residual descends ~30x (17-18 -> 0.45-0.64 Ry) with live charge dynamics across BOTH plain PBE and PBE+U(Ni-3d=3eV) -> symmetry-breaking insight CONFIRMED; but both PLATEAU near-metallic (~0.5-0.9 Ry) and don't reach conv_thr 1e-6 on the SERIAL single-core QE build (the real wall, measured: make.inc MPIF90=gfortran no -D__MPI, the prior -np 12 = 12 redundant serial copies; PBE/PBE+U under-gap the excitonic gap) -> gap STILL UNRESOLVED, NOT fabricated (deferred fix = DFT-relaxed beta=90.644 coords / denser k-mesh / HSE, needs a PARALLEL build). Cross-spacer coupling = labeled order-of-magnitude estimate (Keldysh/Laturia hBN, steep geometry dilution ~4x/ML); FULL heterostructure cRPA DEFERRED. Trio stays 🟠 jointly-unrealized; absorbed=false.
Repository components.

src/ — flat-band geometry predictor + screening tools (fbgeom_predictor.py, screen_catalogue.py, extract_candidates.py, kubo_pair_stiffness.py, lang_firsov_offdiag_metric.py, lane_* ED solvers, build_deck.py …). Verification/ranking/education tools — NOT discovery tools (predicted materials are all published). tool/rtsc_candidates.py = LIVING +@ candidate-materials registry + verifier (reuses rtsc_harness engine); current lead CoSn/hBN/Ta2NiSe5 clears the +@ box on paper (137K coordinate) but jointly unrealized (🟠, absorbed=false).

state/rtsc.demi — 7-verb pipeline manifest (specify · structure · design · analyze · synthesize · verify · handoff) on the hexa cellrun dispatcher. analyze=pyfemm HTS magnetics (macOS honest-skip), verify=GetDP HTS EM. All cells GATE_OPEN.

state/RTSC_LEDGER.jsonl — per-material campaign ledger (SSOT). One line/material: status·stage·λ·ω_log·Tc·stability·verdict·absorbed·record pointer. Verdict tiers: 🔵 formal · 🟢 GATE_CLOSED_MEASURED · 🔴 CLOSED-negative · 🟠 INCONCLUSIVE. Plus RTSC_HARVEST_PARTIAL.jsonl.
state/exports/ — per-material verdict records + turnkey QE decks (LiBeB ambient deck-set, wave3 decks). Heavy raw staging tarball (Li2MgH16, 568 MB) intentionally excluded from this repo.
state/papers/ — flatband-geometry-ambient-roomt-closed (closed-negative), rtsc-campaign-2026, rtsc-dft-h3s-textbook, rtsc-superconductor.
HYPOTHESES — hypothesis-verification system (pre-register → falsify → run → verbatim verdict), modeled on anima's UNIVERSE/. Turns campaign questions into numerically falsifiable, runnable cards.
HYPOTHESES/HYPOTHESES.jsonl — flat registry, one JSON line per hypothesis (id, slug, tier, title, card, verdict, artifacts).

HYPOTHESES/cards/H_*.md — one card per hypothesis: frozen pre-registration + predictions + >=5 measurable falsifiers + honest limits + verbatim run verdict. _TEMPLATE.md is the skeleton. Seeded: H_001 flat-band two-lever wall (CLOSED-NEGATIVE), H_002 ambient superhydride stability (INCONCLUSIVE). +@ combination chain: H_003 bilayer division-of-labor SPLITs the two levers → box opens via a phonon-transparent/electron-opaque interface (relocates the wall, not removes it); H_004 glue-reservoir ceiling → room-T needs an electronic eV-glue (phonons cap ~91 K); H_005 2-factor capstone → ~319 K in the toy band, room-T FACTORIZED into 2 unsolved sub-problems; H_006 dimension lever (REAL-3D, src/fbgeom_3d.py) → L_3D=1.84x real-but-partial, native 3D flat bands band-touching (clean bypass BLOCKED); H_007 3-combination scan → stacking the real 3D lever relaxes the glue demand 1.84x (each lever necessary); H_008 retarded-vertex bipolaron ED (REAL many-body ED on pool host summer) → pair-channel <g>_pair exceeds the single-particle bound 4.27x in the anti-adiabatic corner (glue lever real, corner-confined); H_009 connector spacer (trilayer A/C/B) → a wide-gap/phonon-matched spacer (hBN-class) opens a fabricable [0.44,1.78 ML] electron-opaque/phonon-transparent window (the 3rd material is the link); H_010 top-down lever-count scan → more levers = achievability not redundancy (4 is the minimal achievable count; 3D crosses the sub-eV glue line, connector is structural). Real verdicts preserved as *.out in the state run dirs; H_011 +@ crux -> the trilayer is self-consistent only for a BOSONIC (exciton/plasmon, Coulomb-field-coupled) glue that penetrates the electron-opaque connector (fermionic transfer glue blocked); closed-form +@ deepening DEPLETED, remaining frontier = real DFT/cRPA trilayer (deferred). Fleet orthogonal-lever lanes (NOT free wins): H_012 topology gap COLLAPSES into the geometry lever (amplitude-only, room-T is stiffness-limited); H_013 fractionalization opens the box but needs an exotic ~800 meV deconfinement gap (relocated bill, ~77 K); H_014 competing-order CLOSED-NEGATIVE — the room-T glue drives SDW before SC (the dominant risk realized; conditional on toy nesting). Binding open question now = competing order + the real DFT verdict. H_015 trilayer DFT electron-opacity (🟢 REAL-DFT) — first REAL ab-initio verdict: self-built QE 7.2 PBE+D3 scan of graphene/hBN(n)/graphene (n=0..3, summer pool; apt pw.x 6.7 aborts on a fortify buffer-overflow); hBN suppresses interlayer electronic coupling (graphene Dirac-point residual DOS 7.7x lower at n=1 vs direct contact, plateau; spacer-interior DOS at E_F decays with n; 4/4) — confirms the +@ ELECTRON-OPACITY half ONLY (glue-transparent / bosonic cRPA half still deferred, L1). Verification lanes: H_016 competing-order ESCAPE (frustration eta*<0.45 lifts H_014's wall — removable, but room-T amplitude uncleared); H_017 disorder flat-band O2 CLOSED-NEGATIVE (disorder-flatness vs delocalization mutually exclusive); H_018 adversarial held-out check of the central Tc estimator — passes geomean/bias (4/5) but FAILS per-material scatter (1061x) -> room-T Tc extrapolations carry order-of-magnitude uncertainty (down-weight to coordinates; wall findings unaffected). H_015 trilayer-DFT electron-opacity lane in-flight on summer. H_019 first REAL PBE DFT of the named +@ trilayer's two layers (🟡 PARTIAL): CoSn kagome flat band W=0.158 eV CONFIRMED but ~1.45 eV below E_F; Ta2NiSe5 296-e SCF unconverged -> gap deferred. H_023 demand-relaxation (🟠-CONDITIONAL, strongest 🟢-path): a modest multilayer D_s boost f_mult>=1.164 at N=2 lets the clean q=0 Ta2NiSe5 trio clear room-T; single unknown = real multilayer D_s. H_024 real-DFT follow-on (🟡 PARTIAL): closes the GEOMETRY half — CoSn ∫tr g metric integral I=2.856 MATCHES measured QGT 2.87 (g>=2 lever survives), deep position is REAL orbital-selection not a PBE artifact, and the Peotta-Tormae+Huhtinen D_s(N=2) bound SUPPORTS H_023's f_mult>=1.164 (conditional on doping+coherence, is_green=False); the Ta2NiSe5 GAP half stays DEFERRED (296-e PBE SCF non-converging across 10 recipe variants, recipe-independent ill-conditioning of the excitonic-parent cell). H_025 ta2nise5-symbroken-gap (🟡 PARTIAL POSITIVE): TESTED H_024's logged fix — the EXPERIMENTAL low-T MONOCLINIC C2/c ground state (Sunshine&Ibers 1985) BREAKS the Cmcm freeze (residual descends ~30x, 17-18 -> 0.45-0.64 Ry, live charge dynamics, across BOTH plain PBE and PBE+U(Ni-3d=3eV)) -> the symmetry-breaking insight CONFIRMED; but both PLATEAU near-metallic (~0.5-0.9 Ry) and don't reach 1e-6 on the SERIAL single-core QE build (the real wall, measured: the prior -np 12 = 12 redundant serial copies) -> gap STILL UNRESOLVED, not fabricated (fix = DFT-relaxed coords / denser k-mesh / HSE, needs a parallel build). Trio stays 🟠; absorbed=false.

tool/rtsc_harness.py — shared deterministic stdlib-only harness (two_lever_box_check, geometric_bkt_tc_band, allen_dynes_tc, omega_for_bkt_tc, PHONON_CEILING_MEV, proximity_bilayer_levers + critical_electron_cost (+@ bilayer), THREED_TC_LEVER + stacked_tc + omega_for_stacked_tc (combination scan), spacer_window + spacer_electron_cost + spacer_phonon_transmission (connector C), glue_through_spacer_window + coulomb_glue_coupling (bosonic-glue crux), Falsifier/evaluate). Anima-parity: shared machinery in repo-root tool/. Heavy real compute stays in src/ (fbgeom_3d.py 3D geometry · lane_a_explicit_phonon_bipolaron_ed.py many-body ED) and is dispatched to the shared pool (summer) per heavy-on-pool.
state/<hX>_<slug>_<date>/run_*.py + result.json — per-hypothesis deterministic run importing tool/; verdict = verbatim stdout (no LLM self-judge).
predict → screen → structure → deck → compute → gate → ledger; campaign questions also become falsifiable HYPOTHESES cards.
Input — flat-band geometry predictor + Materials Project / OPTIMADE / AFLOW / JARVIS screening → light-element metallic candidate roster.
Fetch structure → build turnkey QE deck (build_deck.py / hexa deck) → vc-relax/scf/ph.
Run el-ph (DFPT λ/ω_log/Tc) → falsifier cascade (BETE-NET screen → Allen-Dynes → Eliashberg → RTSC5 gate). Heavy compute on cloud pods (per-material).
Output — verdict record in state/exports/ + one ledger line in RTSC_LEDGER.jsonl. Negative/inconclusive results preserved, not deleted.
